description: A logistics coordinator needs to find a carrier for a full truckload shipment and tender the load.

nodes.task_description: Create a new shipment record with the origin, destination, weight, and required pickup/delivery dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately enters all shipment details.

nodes.task_description: Request spot quotes from a list of approved FTL carriers for the shipment's lane.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends out quote requests to multiple carriers.

nodes.task_description: Review the returned quotes and select the carrier with the best rate and service level.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes an optimal decision based on the provided quotes.

nodes.task_description: Tender the load to the selected carrier, sending them all necessary pickup information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully tenders the load and receives a confirmation from the carrier.
